//: Template for ~/.gemini/settings.json. setup.sh installs it (patching model.name from GEMINI_MODEL) so students are never prompted AND the free-tier quota is protected. Quota-critical: experimental.enableAgents=false (subagent auto-delegation caused ~75% of token burn in testing) and experimental.useModelRouter=false (stops silent drift to a costlier auto-routed model). The context.* and summarizeToolOutput.* keys trim how much context is sent per request; model.maxSessionTurns is a runaway-session guard. There is no direct 'context window size' setting — the window is a fixed model property; these limit what the CLI accumulates/sends.
